content:
✨ Infographic | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Generating and rendering high-quality infographics declaratively, with AI assistance for creation and editing.
✨ Key Features: • AI-friendly configuration and syntax for AI generation, streaming output, and rendering • Approximately 200 built-in infographic templates, data-item components, and layouts • Theme system with preset themes and deep customization options
📖 Summary: AntV Infographic is a declarative infographic visualization engine that uses a specialized syntax to quickly and flexibly render high-quality infographics. It aims to make information presentation more efficient and data storytelling simpler, with AI-friendly features for generation and editing.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
